headline: AMETEK Announces Agreement to Acquire Indicor Instrumentation
summary: AMETEK, Inc. (NYSE: AME) today announced that it has entered into a definitive agreement to acquire a portfolio of instrumentation businesses from Indicor, LLC ("Indicor Instrumentation") in an all‑cash transaction valued at approximately $5.0 billion.
